summary: Meta's Brain2Qwerty v2 achieves real-time sentence decoding from non-invasive brain signals.
Meta发布了Brain2Qwerty v2，能够从非侵入性脑信号中实时解码句子。
OpenAI's GPT-5.6 launched with a restricted rollout at the request of the U.S. government.
OpenAI推出GPT-5.6，采用受限发布模式，初期仅限于受信任的合作伙伴。
GLM-5.2 outperforms in coding benchmarks, showcasing rapid advancements.
GLM-5.2在编码和代理基准测试中表现出色。
OpenAI announced Jalapeño, its first custom AI chip, aiming for full-stack AI infrastructure control.
OpenAI推出首款定制AI芯片Jalapeño，旨在增强LLM推理能力。
Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a Slack-native feature for team collaboration.
Anthropic推出Claude Tag，作为Slack内的团队成员，支持异步任务委派。
OpenAI's Daybreak program expands into cyber security with GPT-5.5-Cyber.
OpenAI推出GPT-5.5-Cyber，扩展其网络安全能力。
GLM-5.2 emerges as a strong open-weight coding model, challenging proprietary models.
GLM-5.2被认为是首个可替代封闭模型的开放权重编码模型。
Anthropic released Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, with Fable 5 being generally available and Mythos 5 restricted.
Anthropic发布了Claude Fable 5和Claude Mythos 5，前者为广泛可用，后者为限制访问。
FrontierCode introduces a new benchmark focusing on mergeable software, revealing coding challenges.
FrontierCode引入新基准，强调代码可合并性而非仅通过单元测试。
Anthropic's Mythos/Opus cycle sparks debate on AI capabilities and benchmark performance.
Anthropic 的 Mythos/Opus 周期引发了关于其性能和潜力的讨论。
NVIDIA released Nemotron 3 Ultra, a 550B MoE model, offering significant speed and cost improvements for agentic tasks.
NVIDIA发布Nemotron 3 Ultra和3.5 ASR，提升AI模型性能。
Microsoft's MAI-Thinking-1 model achieves 97% on AIME 2025 without third-party distillation.
微软发布MAI-Thinking-1，展示了无第三方蒸馏的通用推理模型。
Microsoft announced seven new MAI models, including MAI-Thinking-1, with detailed technical disclosures.
微软在Build大会上推出了七个新的MAI模型，包括MAI-Thinking-1，这是微软的首个推理模型。
NVIDIA's Cosmos 3 and Nemotron 3 Ultra mark significant advancements in open physical AI models.
NVIDIA推出Cosmos 3和Nemotron 3 Ultra，推动开放物理AI的发展。
Claude Opus 4.8 rollout shows incremental improvements but mixed evaluations.
Claude Opus 4.8版本推出，尽管在某些基准测试中表现不佳，但在实际应用中显示出改进。
Anthropic raised $65B in Series H funding at a $965B valuation, indicating significant growth and enterprise adoption.
Anthropic完成65亿美元融资，估值达9650亿美元，并发布Claude Opus 4.8和动态工作流。
EAGLE 3.1 enhances inference efficiency with architectural improvements, reducing attention drift and CPU utilization.
EAGLE 3.1通过稳定隐藏状态反馈和减少注意力漂移，提高了推理效率。
Harness engineering is becoming crucial for coding agents, emphasizing model + harness + eval loop.
DeepSeek正在构建一个harness团队，以优化模型输出和验证。
AI development is shifting focus from model quality to a holistic approach including workflow and economics.
AI产品开发重点转向综合解决方案，包括模型、工作流和经济性。
RAEv2 offers >10x faster convergence and improved generation.
RAEv2大幅提升了视觉理解与生成的速度和质量。
OpenAI's general-purpose reasoning model disproved a long-standing Erdős problem, showcasing advanced AI capabilities.
OpenAI 使用通用推理模型解决了一个长期存在的数学问题。
Google I/O 2026 introduced Gemini 3.5 Flash, a high-speed agentic/coding model with 1M-token context and 65k max output.
Google在I/O大会上推出了Gemini 3.5 Flash，专注于快速代理和编码工作负载。
LangSmith Engine and SmithDB enhance agent observability and automation.
LangSmith Engine和SmithDB推动代理基础设施的成熟，强调可观察性和自动化。
Cerebras IPO marks a significant milestone, highlighting its capability to serve trillion-parameter models, including Op
Cerebras成功上市，展示其在推理基础设施中的重要性。
OpenAI launched Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app, enhancing remote coding workflows.
OpenAI推出Codex移动应用，支持远程控制和审查代码代理会话。
